case_title: HARO, MANUEL vs. SEVEN SPICES'MON A PARTN RICK CAREY & SUSAN CAREY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARO, MANUEL AS TO DEFENDANT SEVEN SPICES'MON A PARTN RICK CAREY & SUSAN CAREY CAREY, RICK CAREY, SUSAN
